testcase.name: testWrongLeaveDeductionWithTwoThreads
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Detect Wrong Leave Deduction With Two Threads Employee ID: E001 Leave type: ANNUAL Initial remaining leave days: 12 Deduct days per thread: 3 Threads started: 2 Successful threads: 2 / 2 Expected remaining leave days: 6 Actual remaining leave days: 6 Expected used leave days: 6 Actual used leave days: 6 Final version: 2 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testDeductMoreThanAvailable
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Deduct More Than Available Employee ID: E001 Initial leave balance: 12 Requested leave days: 15 Deduction success: false Remaining leave days: 12 Used leave days: 0 Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testDeductAllRemainingLeave
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Deduct All Remaining Leave Employee ID: E001 Initial leave balance: 12 Requested leave days: 12 Deduction success: true Remaining leave days: 0 Used leave days: 12 Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testCorrectSingleLeaveDeduction
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Correct Single Leave Deduction Employee ID: E001 Leave type: ANNUAL Old leave balance: 12 Leave days requested: 2 Deduction success: true Expected remaining leave days: 10 Actual remaining leave days: 10 Expected used leave days: 2 Actual used leave days: 2 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testCalculateExpectedLeaveBalance
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Calculate Expected Leave Balance Old leave balance: 15 Leave days requested: 5 Expected remaining leave days: 10 Actual remaining leave days: 10 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testEmployeeNotFound
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Employee Not Found Employee ID: E999 Deduction success: false Employee exists: false Result: PASSED ======================================
